pitchEn: Market Pulse is an educational, multi-market analyzer. It reads public market data (cryptocurrencies, gold and metals, stock indices by country, and real-estate ETFs), market sentiment and news, and computes classic indicators (RSI, moving-average trend, momentum) for a period you choose. It is strictly educational and is NOT investment advice.
newFeaturesEn: First release: analyze crypto, gold, stock indices (by country) and real-estate markets; drill down market -> country -> instrument; pick a period (now / 1-5 years ago / custom dates such as May-August 2015) and see the reading plus what happened next; classic indicators and market sentiment (Fear & Greed); current news and news from the selected period. Educational only - not investment advice.

dataHandling.notes: Reads public market data (CoinGecko, Stooq), market sentiment (alternative.me Fear & Greed) and news headlines (Google News RSS). No account, no wallet, no trading, no payments and no personal data. Only your language and app preferences are stored on-device. A mandatory disclaimer states the app is educational and not investment advice.

reviewerRemarksEn: No login or account. On first launch: a short KCY Ecosystem intro, then choose a language, then a MANDATORY disclaimer screen (educational only, not investment advice) with an 'I have read and I agree' checkbox that must be ticked to continue. Then pick a market (Crypto / Gold / Stock indices / Real estate) -> country/instrument -> see the analysis for a chosen period plus current and period news. Internet is used only to read public prices, sentiment and news from free sources.
